components.name: Bootstrap
components.description: Entry point that parses CLI arguments and dispatches to commands

components.name: Commands
components.description: Command implementations: core, setup, cloud, agent-management, messaging, monitoring, auth, doctor

components.name: CLI Library
components.description: Shared helpers for client creation, formatting, JSON parsing, and path resolution

components.name: Spawner
components.description: Spawns CLI agent subprocesses (Claude, Codex, Gemini) as PTY processes

components.name: PTY Worker
components.description: Manages PTY I/O: reads agent output, writes injected messages, detects prompts

components.name: Routing
components.description: Routes messages between agents based on channel and target name

components.name: Relaycast WS
components.description: WebSocket client connecting to Relaycast Cloud for cross-process relay

components.name: Listen API
components.description: HTTP API for SDK to subscribe to broker events

components.name: AgentRelayClient
components.description: Main client class — spawns broker, manages agent lifecycle, sends messages

components.name: AgentRelay
components.description: High-level relay facade with typed spawn methods (claude, codex, gemini)

components.name: Protocol
components.description: Protocol types, envelopes, and version constants shared with Rust broker

components.name: Workflows
components.description: Higher-level workflow abstractions for agent orchestration patterns

relationships.description: Uses shared helpers for output formatting and client factory
Creates AgentRelayClient to communicate with broker
Delegates spawn and messaging operations to AgentRelayClient
Subscribes to broker events via HTTP
Routes incoming messages to target agent PTY
Broadcasts messages to remote agents via Relaycast
Creates PTY worker for each spawned agent
